name: autodemo
description: AutoDemo — every release publishes its own video, automatically. Reads the UI diff, reproduces the changed interface 1:1 in Remotion, animates the new element, renders an MP4.

scripts.feature-rec:selftest: pnpm --filter @feature-rec/core run selftest && pnpm --filter @feature-rec/service run selftest && pnpm --filter @feature-rec/action run selftest
